header.title: Job Search Tracker
header.subtitle: Sign in to sync across devices · use JSON for offline backup
header.connectDriveTooltip: Connect Google Drive for cross-device sync

board.emptyDesc: Get started by importing a backup, adding your first company, or taking a quick tour.
board.noteText: When you're done for the day, don't forget to click the download icon in the top bar to save an updated copy on your computer.

timeline.title: Activity History
timeline.empty: No events to display on the timeline.

form.descriptionPlaceholder: Company description and what they do...

detail.noInterviews: No interview information for this company. Click "Edit Details" to add.
detail.selectCompany: Select a company from the list
detail.selectCompanyHint: or use the JSON upload buttons above to load data

toast.exported: Backup file downloaded - save it somewhere safe!
toast.driveConnectedWithData: Drive connected — data loaded from Drive!
toast.driveConnectedEmpty: Drive connected — data will sync automatically.

alert.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this company?
alert.noCompanyData: No company data found in the uploaded file.
alert.importError: Error importing file. Make sure this is a valid JSON file you saved previously.

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Your personal job search command center
onboarding.welcomeDesc: Track every company, interview, and rejection — all in one place. Your data stays private in your browser.
onboarding.boardSubtitle: Visualize your pipeline with drag & drop
onboarding.boardDesc: Each company appears as a card in its status column. Drag cards between columns to update their status instantly.
onboarding.dragHint: ↑ Interview journey chips show your progress
onboarding.boardTip: Tip: Download a JSON backup daily from the top bar to never lose your data.
onboarding.listDesc: The List tab is your editing hub. Click any company to view details, or add interviews and rejection notes.
onboarding.importDesc: Load a JSON backup you saved previously
onboarding.aiSubtitle: Get personalized prep tips powered by Claude
onboarding.aiDesc: The AI Assistant reads your company data and gives you personalized interview prep tips and rejection analysis — powered by Claude.
onboarding.aiFeature1: Interview prep: 3 targeted tips before each interview
onboarding.aiFeature2: Rejection analysis: learn what to improve
onboarding.aiFeature3: Pattern analysis: spot trends in your job hunt
onboarding.aiKeyDesc: You need a free Anthropic API key. Click the ⚙️ icon in the header to add it.
onboarding.shortcutsDesc: Use keyboard shortcuts to navigate faster:
onboarding.finalTip: You're all set! Add rejection notes to every rejection — the AI can spot patterns to help you improve.

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.noKey: Set API key to enable AI →
ai.debriefPlaceholder: Write anything — what questions were asked, how you answered, how you felt, what surprised you...
ai.debriefPrivacy: Avoid writing personal names — this text is sent to the AI.

settings.title: AI Settings
settings.ollamaNote: Make sure Ollama is running locally with CORS enabled.

rejection.aiNeeded: Enable AI to get personalized improvement suggestions.
